subcodes.first_line: The Point hath testified that there is none other God but Him, the Single, the One, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise, and verily She hath appeared and [3.5s]... ...Well is it with the physician who cureth ailments in My hallowed and dearly-cherished Name.
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهدت النقطه انه لا اله الا هو الفرد الواحد العلیم الحکیم و انها لظهرت و
subcodes.subjects: @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @empty learning; false spirituality, @praise and encouragement
